hero.welcomeText: This version is tailored for PhD students, MSc students, postdocs, and research-focused early-career academics who want a stronger research identity on the homepage.

hiring.title: Open to Collaboration & Hiring
hiring.description: I'm actively seeking research collaborators, postdoctoral fellows, and motivated graduate students interested in human-computer interaction, accessibility, and reproducible research methods. If you share a passion for inclusive design and rigorous experimentation, let's build something meaningful together.

opportunities.title: Open to Collaborate
opportunities.summary: Seeking PhD, MSc, and postdoctoral opportunities, and also open to collaborative research, student supervision support, and interdisciplinary academic partnerships.

lab.title: Advanced Systems & Learning Lab
lab.description: Our lab focuses on building usable systems, publishing reproducible work, and designing responsibly. We explore the intersection of human-computer interaction, machine learning, and accessibility to solve real-world problems. We prioritize hands-on projects, rigorous experiments, and open-source contributions.

researchProfile.title: Research Highlights & Interests
researchProfile.summary: A student-focused research section that surfaces your main interests, strongest contributions, and the themes you want visitors to notice first.

highlights.title: Technical Skills & Frameworks
highlights.description: Software, tools, and research workflows presented in a more compact academic style.

items.name: Python
items.note: Data analysis, automation, and research scripting.

items.name: LaTeX
items.note: Academic writing, thesis preparation, and publication formatting.

items.name: GIS & Mapping Tools
items.note: Spatial data interpretation and field-oriented visualization.

highlights.title: Area of Expertise
highlights.description: Core research domains that define the academic profile.

highlights.title: Current Research Direction
highlights.description: Topics that can be emphasized beside the slider and welcome copy.
items: High vacuum densification for weak soil
Correlation of field and laboratory parameters

highlights.title: Collaboration Focus
highlights.description: Themes suitable for future PhD, MSc, or postdoctoral collaboration.

hero.headline: Building rigorous, collaborative, and high-impact research in geotechnical engineering
hero.description: Our lab advances experimental and data-informed geotechnical research with a focus on soft soil improvement, ground response, sustainable engineering methods, and the training of future researchers. We combine laboratory studies, field-oriented thinking, and interdisciplinary collaboration to translate research into practice.

collaboration.title: Collaboration & Open Positions
collaboration.description: We welcome applications from highly motivated PhD students, Master's researchers, and postdoctoral scholars who want to work on experimental geotechnics, soil improvement, field-informed modeling, and interdisciplinary civil engineering research. We are also open to academic, industrial, and international research collaborations.

aboutLab.title: About the Lab
aboutLab.summary: The lab serves as a research, training, and collaboration platform where experimental methods, engineering judgment, and data-driven analysis come together to address real-world geotechnical challenges.
overview: The lab investigates weak and problematic soils, soil improvement methods, and engineering performance through controlled experimentation and applied interpretation.
Our work connects academic depth with practical engineering relevance, supporting both scientific contribution and field translation.
We aim to create a research culture that is technically strong, collaborative, and supportive of independent scholarly growth.

researchThemes.title: Soft Soil Improvement
researchThemes.description: Experimental and applied study of densification, stabilization, and performance enhancement methods for weak soils.

researchThemes.title: Vacuum-Based Ground Improvement
researchThemes.description: Investigation of high-vacuum densification concepts, mechanisms, and engineering implications under controlled conditions.

researchThemes.title: Field and Laboratory Correlation
researchThemes.description: Bridging laboratory measurements and field parameters to improve interpretation, design confidence, and engineering applicability.

researchThemes.title: Sustainable Geotechnical Solutions
researchThemes.description: Development of methods and materials that support resilient, economical, and environmentally responsible geotechnical practice.

facilities: Data analysis and visual interpretation pipelines
culture: Strong mentoring for graduate and early-career researchers
Emphasis on writing, technical communication, and publication quality
Collaborative research planning with clear ownership and growth
Inclusive lab culture built around curiosity, rigor, and professionalism

projects.title: Assistive UX Toolkit
projects.subtitle: Tooling & patterns for inclusive interfaces
projects.description: A toolkit for designers & developers to build accessible UI components and test assistive workflows.
projects.longDescription: This project develops a reusable accessibility-oriented toolkit for interface prototyping, testing, and implementation. It combines design guidance, tested interface patterns, and evaluation workflows to help research teams and developers build more inclusive digital systems.

media.featuredImageCaption: Core toolkit interface used for design and accessibility evaluation.

Accessibility testing environment used in project evaluation

highlights: Reusable UI patterns for accessible product development
Evaluation workflow for assistive interaction testing
Research translation into practical academic and development settings

figures.caption: Design review and collaborative prototyping workflow
Accessibility testing environment used in project evaluation

projects.title: Repro Pipelines
projects.subtitle: Workflows for reproducible experiments
projects.description: Automated scripts and containerized environments that make experiments reproducible.
projects.longDescription: A reproducible research workflow designed to improve consistency across data preparation, experiment execution, analysis, and reporting. The project supports transparent academic practice and faster collaboration among distributed research teams.

media.featuredImageCaption: Pipeline overview showing code, data, and reproducibility workflow integration.

screenshots.caption: Research computing workflow for repeatable experiment design
Code, data, and result tracking pipeline

highlights: Automated setup for repeatable experiment execution
Containerized environments for stable academic workflows
Integrated output pipeline for documentation and reporting

figures.caption: Research computing workflow for repeatable experiment design
Code, data, and result tracking pipeline

projects.title: Study Portal
projects.subtitle: Participant recruitment & consent
projects.description: A secure, privacy-preserving portal to manage research participants and consent forms.
projects.longDescription: A secure project platform supporting participant recruitment, informed consent workflows, and structured research communication. The system was designed to reduce administrative burden while improving privacy and process consistency in study management.
